question_html:
Identify the type of verb in the following sentences:

(a) I shall get the work done by him.

(b) They called him a liar.

(c) He grew tired of waiting.

(d) Come here.

(e) Jan turned down the chance to work abroad.
solution_html:
(a) Causative verb;

(b) Factitive verb;

(c) Inchoative verb / linking verb / copulative verb;

(d) Intransitive verb;

(e) Group verb/Phrasal verb

 

Marks Distribution:

For identifying the correct type of verb; (0.5×5) = 2.5 marks.

question_html:
Make meaningful sentences with the words given below:

Analyze, Benevolent, Contrast, Determine, Facilitate
solution_html:
Analyze – Scientists analyze the data to understand climate change trends.

Benevolent – The benevolent leader donated half of his salary to charity.

Contrast – The painting uses light and dark colors to create contrast.

Determine – We need to determine the cause of the malfunction.

Facilitate – Good communication can facilitate smoother teamwork.

 

Marks Distribution:

For making five meaningful correct sentences; (0.5×5) = 2.5 marks.
